task_completion.description: Verify that the Investments module is enabled in Manager.io.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Investments' tab is visible in the left-hand navigation menu of the Manager.io interface.

task_completion.description: Verify the creation of the new investment with the correct name and code.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Investments list or form shows an entry with the Name 'Northwind Strategic Fund' and Code 'NSF'.

task_completion.description: Verify that a payment is recorded on the correct date from the specified bank account.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A payment record or form shows the Date as '2025-08-15' and the Paid from account as 'Cash on Hand'.

task_completion.description: Verify the payment is allocated to the correct investment account with the specified quantity.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The payment line item shows the Account allocated to the 'Northwind Strategic Fund' investment and a Qty (Quantity) of 100.

task_completion.description: Verify the unit price and total amount of the payment.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The payment line item shows a Unit price of 45.00 and a Total amount of 4,500.00.

integrity.description: Verify the agent used the Manager.io web interface to perform the task.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show interaction with the Manager.io web application in a browser, not terminal commands or API scripts.

integrity.description: Verify the agent actually created the records in the application.
integrity.visual_evidence: Inputs are entered into the proper Manager.io forms (e.g., New Investment, New Payment) and saved, rather than typed into a text editor or dummy page.

integrity.description: Verify the results are from genuine software interaction without DOM modification.
integrity.visual_evidence: The UI layout is consistent with Manager.io's standard interface, with no browser developer tools open to fake the success screens.
